## What's new

- Added "key-charting" from the official editor, allowing you to use your keyboard to place notes. (Experimental!)
  - Press 1-6 to place notes in the corresponding column.
  - Hold 1-6 and scroll the mouse to create a hold note, with its length determined by the scroll amount.
  - Hold shift to place dodge, double or zoom notes (depending on the column).
  - You can toggle this in both the settings menu and inside the editor (disabled by default).
- Modifiers can now be correctly toggled by pressing Q~P, depending on the order they appear in.

**Happy mapping!**
